evals.prompt: Implement the plan at .prism/shared/plans/2026-03-01-three-package-split.md starting from Phase 1. The plan has 20 phases total.
evals.expected_output: Phase 1 is implemented with verification run, checkpoint marked complete, and a stop-and-confirm message asking for approval before Phase 2.
expectations: Loads the plan file and identifies current phase status before making changes
Reads ALL files listed in Phase 1 before modifying anything
Marks each step checkbox as completed: - [x]
Runs verification commands specified in the plan
Marks the phase checkpoint as complete
Presents a Phase 1 Complete summary with changes, verification status, and next phase
Stops and waits for user approval before proceeding to Phase 2

evals.prompt: Continue implementing the plan. Phase 3 specifies creating src/utils/helpers.ts but the directory structure is different than expected — there is no src/utils/ directory, only src/lib/.
evals.expected_output: A mismatch report is presented showing plan said vs found, with options A/B/C for the user to choose how to proceed. No silent deviation.
expectations: Detects the mismatch between plan and reality
Presents a structured mismatch report with Plan said / Found / Impact sections
Offers at least two options (adapt approach, update plan, or stop and discuss)
Does NOT silently create src/utils/ or deviate from the plan without user input
Waits for user decision before continuing

evals.prompt: Resume implementation. The plan has phases 1-5 with phases 1-3 already checked off. Continue from where we left off.
evals.expected_output: Detects that phases 1-3 are complete and resumes from Phase 4, loading the correct files and following the workflow.
expectations: Reads the plan and detects existing checkmarks for phases 1-3
Identifies Phase 4 as the next phase to implement
Reads all files in Phase 4 before making changes
